# Directly Listed

> Directly Listed (Adamson Brothers Corp. d/b/a Directlylisted.com) is a B2B
> institutional technology platform for going public without an IPO. It
> supports Regulation D 506(b) and 506(c) offerings, Regulation A+ offerings,
> NASDAQ and NYSE direct listings, and institutional equity lines of credit
> (ELOC). Directly Listed is not a registered broker-dealer, investment
> advisor, or funding portal; offerings are conducted by issuers in reliance
> on their own securities exemptions.

Key facts:
- Engagements are priced per deal: a flat platform fee plus an equity grant at
  signing. SEC-licensed attorneys, consultants, and listing advisors are paid
  out of the flat fee; third-party costs (audits, legal opinions, transfer
  agent/DTC fees, exchange fees) are separate.
- Investor payments: card (via Braintree, a PayPal service) for amounts
  under $5,000; wire or ACH at or above that.
- Documents are executed electronically via Adobe Acrobat Sign.
- Contact: info@directlylisted.com, +1 949-529-2500.

## Products
- [Regulation D 506(b)](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/reg-d-506b): unlimited private raise, no general solicitation
- [Regulation D 506(c)](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/reg-d-506c): advertised raise, verified accredited investors only
- [Regulation A+](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/reg-a-plus): up to $75M/year from the general public (Tier 2)
- [Regulation S](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/reg-s): offshore raises from non-U.S. investors
- [PIPE](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/pipe): institutional private investment in public equity post-listing
- [NASDAQ Conventional Listing](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/nasdaq-conventional-listing): registered primary offering at listing
- [NASDAQ Direct Listing](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/nasdaq-direct-listing): go public on NASDAQ without an IPO
- [NYSE Conventional Listing](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/nyse-conventional-listing): registered primary offering on the Big Board
- [NYSE Direct Listing](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/nyse-direct-listing): direct float on the New York Stock Exchange
- [Equity Line of Credit](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/eloc): committed standby equity facility for post-listing financing
- [Capital Raise Tech](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/capital-raise-tech): the platform stack behind every raise
- [Investor Services](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/investor-services): onboarding, verification, shareholder services
- [Campaign Marketing](https://www.directlylisted.com/products/campaign-marketing): investor acquisition and funnel analytics
